posts.author: Helen64 (Helen Deakin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Has anyone every created a formula for in and out of goods with a balance that rolls on with each item line, like those used in bank statements. I have my In column and Out column and Balance formula column but I am struggling with what the formula should be to make this work.

Any help would be amazing!

Thanks
Helen
